remarks: 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom townhome with loft This 1,402-square-foot townhome features vaulted ceilings, generously sized bedrooms with natural light, and a large living area that opens to a private balcony overlooking mature trees and a peaceful stream. The updated kitchen includes newer appliances and connects to the main living space for an open, functional layout. A dedicated loft provides flexible space ideal as a home office, or additional storage. A newer high-efficiency HVAC. Water and trash are included in the HOA, which also covers landscaping and exterior maintenance - true maintenance-free living. The 1-car garage features finished garage tiles with one additional parking space directly in front of the unit. The rear of the home backs to a tree-lined setting and stream, offering privacy and a quiet outdoor retreat from the balcony. This townhome provides quick access to I-95, the Merritt Parkway, and Connecticut Avenue. Minutes from South Norwalk and the Merritt 7 Metro-North train stations for commuters to Grand Central. Close to Norwalk Hospital, local dining, and shopping. A low-maintenance, move-in-ready townhome with loft, garage, and nature views in Norwalk, CT
